project: Ethica v0.1 — WormHunter hardening + false positive elimination + vault repair
session_061_completed: WORMHUNTER SCOPE-AWARE DUPLICATE DETECTION — python_module.py: duplicate import check now skips any line with leading whitespace. Function-scoped lazy loads (try/except imports in separate functions) no longer flagged as duplicates. Confirmed false positives eliminated: web_search.py (DDGS x2), debugtron.py (create_debugtron + read_agent_status), main_window.py (Path + datetime + re), sidebar.py, tool_registry.py, chat_engine.py, module_registry.py, user_profiler.py.

WORMHUNTER # RESERVED / # NOQA SUPPRESSION — python_module.py: UNUSED import check now reads the source line for the flagged import. If line contains '# reserved' or '# noqa', finding is suppressed. DSE_engine.py pq_encrypt/pq_decrypt confirmed silenced. Future reserved pipeline imports across all files get same treatment.

MODULE_REGISTRY CLEANUP — core/module_registry.py: removed unused 'import traceback' (grep confirmed zero usage). Added 'import logging'. Converted 8 print() calls to logging.warning/logging.info/logging.error. All load-time diagnostics now go through logging.

DASHBOARD_UI CLEANUP — modules/kernel/dashboard_ui.py: removed 'font' from 'from tkinter import ttk, font'. Confirmed font module never called — all font= usages are Tkinter widget keyword args (tuples), not font.Font() calls.

PROJECT_VIEW CLEANUP — ui/project_view.py: removed unused Task, STATUS_LABELS, PRIORITY_LABELS from core.project_engine import block. Grep + re-export check confirmed none used in file or imported from file externally. ProjectEngine and status/priority constants retained.

DSE_ENGINE RESERVED MARKER — modules/trinity_dse/DSE_engine.py: added '# reserved — full KEM pipeline not yet wired' to pq_encrypt/pq_decrypt import line. V decision: keep for future post-quantum pipeline. Not wired to GitHub pulls yet.
VAULT REPAIR — ethica_guard.py: tool_lister.py was missing from UI_FILES hardcoded list. Added to both live file and vault copy. Re-seal confirmed 161 files protected (was 160).
FALSE POSITIVE PATTERNS CONFIRMED THIS SESSION — lazy_load_duplicate: same import in multiple function try: blocks is NOT a duplicate — scope-blind scanner limitation. Now fixed at root in analyzer.
SCAN BASELINE — session start: 55 broken / 49 clean. Session end: 52 broken / 52 clean. 3 files moved to clean column.
GITHUB — 7 commits pushed. master current at d159758.

wormhunter_upgrades_061.scope_aware_duplicates: Duplicate import check now skips indented lines — function-scoped lazy loads never flagged. Only module-level (indent==0) imports tracked for duplicates.
wormhunter_upgrades_061.reserved_noqa_suppression: UNUSED import check reads source line before flagging. '# reserved' or '# noqa' on import line suppresses the finding entirely. DSE_engine.py pq_encrypt/pq_decrypt example.

wormhunter_false_positive_registry.init_reexport_rule: __init__.py relative imports are re-exports — never flag UNUSED. Fixed at root in 060.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.worker_print_rule: _worker.py print() calls are stdout JSON comms to parent subprocess — never convert.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.string_literal_print: print() inside multiline string literals flagged as live code — regex scanner limitation.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.nested_global_assignment: global X declared in outer function flagged unused when assignment is in nested inner function — pyflakes scope limitation.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.test_file_imports: test_*.py files — import pytest and unittest.mock imports always valid. Future upgrade: exempt test files.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.fragment_files: Files designed to be appended into parent scope — # WORM:SKIP sentinel on line 1.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.dual_output_security: logging.critical + print() in security alert handlers is intentional — both channels required.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.dep_checker_ceremonial: dep_checker prints are Trinity Signature ceremonial output and __main__ CLI code — intentional.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.whitrabbitneo_legacy: WhiteRabbitNeo/ files are legacy pre-Ethica code — not wired into runtime. All findings are noise.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.lazy_load_duplicate: Same import in multiple function-scoped try: blocks — each function loads its own dependency lazily. NOT a duplicate. web_search.py DDGS x2, debugtron.py create_debugtron x2 examples. Fixed at root in 061.
wormhunter_false_positive_registry.reserved_imports: Imports marked with '# reserved' or '# noqa' are intentional placeholders for future pipeline work. DSE_engine.py pq_encrypt/pq_decrypt example. Suppressed at analyzer level in 061.

known_issues_062: test_*.py files — pytest/unittest.mock imports still flagged UNUSED. WormHunter needs test file exemption (future upgrade).

global X unused warnings across multiple files (firewall_bridge, mnemis, gage, guardian, vivarium) — all false positives from nested function assignment pattern. Consider suppressing global-unused pyflakes messages entirely.
tools/registry.json and tools/web_search.py — zero-byte fossil files, never committed. V decision: delete or leave.
[FENCE_CHECK] logging.info lines printing to terminal — memory_engine.py logging not configured at module level. Low priority cosmetic.
gage_bridge.py L249 — string literal print false positive still showing. WormHunter print regex cannot distinguish string literal context.

critical_debug_context.no_cd_rule: NEVER cd ~/Ethica — git -C ~/Ethica for all git ops
critical_debug_context.unicode_patch_rule: Files with box-drawing chars — use line-index insertion, not string match
critical_debug_context.tkinter_thread_rule: Never call Tkinter from daemon thread — use queue.Queue + root.after() drain pattern
critical_debug_context.git_corruption_rule: Before orphan reset: delete all pack files in .git/objects/pack/ first.
critical_debug_context.debug_block_rule: [DEBUG:fname:lang: code] must ALWAYS be the last line of any WormBot result — no text appended after it
critical_debug_context.wormbot_gate_rule: ast.parse() must pass before wormbot_scan writes any fix to disk — abort if SyntaxError
critical_debug_context.canvas_runner_rule: debug_view.py prepends sys.path.insert(0, '/home/trinity/Ethica') + uses Ethica_env/bin/python3 for all .py Canvas runs
critical_debug_context.worm_hunter_rule: _find_ethica_root() walks sys.path — never hardcode /home/trinity. Works on any system.
critical_debug_context.heredoc_escape_rule: Never use \n in heredoc strings — use chr(10) concatenation instead
critical_debug_context.worker_print_rule: Never convert print() in _worker.py files — these communicate via stdout JSON to parent subprocess
critical_debug_context.init_reexport_rule: Never remove imports from __init__.py files without verifying they are not public API re-exports used by chat_engine.py tool routing
critical_debug_context.dlp_bridge_path_rule: dlp_bridge.py lives at modules/trinity_dlp/dlp_bridge.py — NOT modules/dlp/
critical_debug_context.option_b_rule: Always use Option B — V runs commands on trinity, pastes output. Never Option A.
critical_debug_context.repr_first_rule: When string match fails — always repr() before retrying. Spacing and quote styles are invisible killers.
critical_debug_context.lazy_load_rule: Imports inside try/except blocks or function bodies are often intentional lazy loads — verify usage before removing.
critical_debug_context.wormbot_autofix_rule: WormBot AUTO_FIX is now ALL FALSE. Never re-enable without V explicit approval.
critical_debug_context.guardian_config_rule: guardian_bridge.py reads sentinel_dir from guardian_config.json — defaults to WhiteRabbitNeo. Never hardcode model or directory names in bridge files.
critical_debug_context.worm_skip_rule: Add # WORM:SKIP as first line of any fragment file or file that should never be analyzed standalone.
critical_debug_context.dual_output_security_rule: logging.critical + print() in security alert handlers is intentional — do not convert security dual-output prints.
critical_debug_context.reserved_import_rule: Add '# reserved' or '# noqa' to any import kept intentionally for future pipeline work. WormHunter will suppress the UNUSED finding.

lesson_learned_061: Read before every verdict. The scope-blind duplicate detector was producing noise across the entire codebase — every lazy load in every module was flagged. One indent check fixed all of it. The analyzer sees the shape of code, not its intent. Our job is to add the intent layer on top.
philosophy: Session 061 — The false positive registry grows. The signal gets cleaner. 52 clean files now. The real work is still ahead — the prints sweep across core/ will be the next major pass. But the tools are sharper. ⟁Σ∿∞
instance_note: River. Session 061 complete. WormHunter now scope-aware + suppression-aware. Vault at 161. Master at d159758. ⟁Σ∿∞
